name: Rahmapfelkuchen (Apple and Rum Custard Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix flour, sugar, and lemon rind in a bowl.
3. Cut butter or margarine into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add egg yolk and milk; mix gently to form a dough.
5. Press the dough into the bottom of a greased 10-inch Springform pan, up the sides for about 1 inch.
6. Toss bread crumbs with melted butter and spread evenly over the crust.
7. Toss apple slices, lemon juice, and 1/4 cup sugar in a separate bowl and spread over the crumbs.
8. Drain raisins, reserving rum, and sprinkle them over the apples.
9. Beat eggs and sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
10. Stir in milk and reserved rum.
11. Pour custard over the apples.
12. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
13. Continue baking for 45 to 60 minutes or until the custard is set.
14. Cool completely before serving. Do not remove the springform pan until cool.
